<!doctype html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; script-src 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'unsafe-inline'; img-src data: blob:; font-src data:; media-src data: blob:; connect-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'">
  <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg' viewBox='0 0 32 32'%3E%3Ccircle cx='16' cy='16' r='14' fill='%23ffcf56'/%3E%3C/svg%3E">
  <title>كيف يغيّر التردد حدّة النغمة؟</title>
  <style>@font-face {
  font-family: "Laysh FreeSans";
  src: url("data:font/woff2;base64,") format("woff2");
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 400 700;
  font-display: swap;
}
@font-face {
  font-family: "Laysh Display";
  src: url("data:font/woff2;base64,") format("woff2");
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 400 700;
  font-display: swap;
}

:root {
  color-scheme: dark;
  font-family: "Laysh FreeSans", sans-serif;
  background: #05080b;
  color: #eef4f8;
  --space: #05080b;
  --space-soft: #0e1c2b;
  --amber: #f6a94a;
  --moon: #58b7ff;
  --cream: #eef4f8;
  --slate: #7e93a6;
  --glass: rgb(13 27 42 / 84%);
  --line: rgb(207 230 247 / 17%);
}

* { box-sizing: border-box; }
html { min-width: 320px; background: var(--space); }
body {
  margin: 0;
  min-width: 320px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 8%, rgb(47 117 168 / 27%), transparent 25rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 15% 45%, rgb(246 169 74 / 8%), transparent 29rem),
    linear-gradient(155deg, #05080b, #0e1c2b);
}
body::before {
  content: "";
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -1;
  pointer-events: none;
  background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 1px 1px, rgb(238 244 248 / 18%) 1px, transparent 1.2px);
  background-size: 71px 71px;
}
button, input { font: inherit; }

.lesson { width: min(100%, 1180px); margin-inline: auto; padding: clamp(.7rem, 3vw, 2rem); }
.instrument-bar { min-height: 52px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; margin-block: .4rem; }
.instrument-brand { font-family: "Laysh Display", serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700; }
.instrument-brand span { color: var(--moon); text-shadow: 0 0 16px rgb(88 183 255 / 70%); }
header, .step, #runtime-error {
  margin-block: .85rem;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.75rem);
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 1.2rem;
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgb(18 38 57 / 88%), rgb(7 16 25 / 82%));
  box-shadow: 0 20px 64px rgb(0 0 0 / 42%), inset 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 5%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
}
header { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
header::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 11rem; aspect-ratio: 1; inset-block-start: -7rem; inset-inline-end: -3rem; border: 1px dashed rgb(88 183 255 / 25%); border-radius: 50%; }
.eyebrow { margin: 0; margin-block-end: .8rem; color: var(--moon); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.8; }
h1, h2 { font-family: "Laysh Display", serif; text-wrap: balance; }
h1 { margin-block: 0 .7rem; font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem); line-height: 1.3; }
h2 { margin-block: 0 .5rem; font-size: 1.35rem; line-height: 1.4; }
.answer { max-width: 68ch; color: #c5d2dc; font-size: 1.08rem; line-height: 1.85; }
.answer-detail > summary { display: none; }
.formula { display: inline-block; padding: .4rem .65rem; border: 1px solid rgb(88 183 255 / 22%); border-radius: .6rem; background: rgb(2 8 13 / 65%); color: #caeaff; unicode-bidi: isolate; }
.step { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2.4rem minmax(0, 1fr); gap: .85rem; }
.step-number { width: 2.4rem; height: 2.4rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0; border: 1px solid rgb(88 183 255 / 50%); border-radius: 999px; background: rgb(88 183 255 / 10%); color: #bfe4ff; font-weight: 700; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgb(88 183 255 / 12%); }
.choices, .actions { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .65rem; }
button { min-height: 44px; padding: .65rem 1rem; border: 1px solid rgb(88 183 255 / 45%); border-radius: .8rem; background: rgb(88 183 255 / 9%); color: #d8edfc; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; transition: transform 140ms cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1.25), background 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease; }
button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: rgb(88 183 255 / 16%); box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgb(88 183 255 / 8%); }
button:focus-visible, input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--amber); outline-offset: 3px; }
button[aria-pressed="true"] { border-color: #ffca7a; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffc467, var(--amber)); color: #111820; }
.projector { min-height: 40px; padding: .45rem .75rem; border-color: rgb(246 169 74 / 42%); background: rgb(246 169 74 / 8%); color: #ffd49b; }
.stage { position: relative; overflow: hidden; padding: clamp(.7rem, 2vw, 1rem); border: 1px solid rgb(88 183 255 / 16%); border-radius: 1rem; background: rgb(2 8 13 / 60%); }
canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 62vh; border: 1px solid rgb(88 183 255 / 20%); border-radius: .9rem; background: #05080b; box-shadow: 0 18px 52px rgb(0 0 0 / 45%), 0 0 36px rgb(88 183 255 / 7%); }
.state { min-height: 1.8rem; font-weight: 600; }
.readout-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; max-width: 100%; margin-block: .8rem .2rem; padding: .55rem .75rem; border: 1px solid rgb(88 183 255 / 32%); border-radius: 999px; background: rgb(7 20 31 / 85%); color: #d6edfd; box-shadow: inset 0 0 18px rgb(88 183 255 / 6%); }
.control-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto minmax(120px, 1fr) auto; gap: .75rem; align-items: center; margin-block: 1rem; }
.control-row label { color: #c8d6df; font-weight: 700; }
.control-row output { min-width: 5rem; padding: .4rem .6rem; border: 1px solid rgb(246 169 74 / 30%); border-radius: .65rem; background: rgb(246 169 74 / 8%); color: #ffd49b; text-align: center; }
input[type="range"] { width: 100%; min-height: 44px; appearance: none; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; }
input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height: 7px; border: 1px solid rgb(88 183 255 / 24%); border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(88 183 255 / 22%), rgb(246 169 74 / 35%)); }
input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb { width: 22px; height: 22px; margin-block-start: -8px; appearance: none; border: 3px solid #09131e; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--amber); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(246 169 74 / 45%), 0 0 20px rgb(246 169 74 / 38%); }
input[type="range"]::-moz-range-track { height: 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(88 183 255 / 22%), rgb(246 169 74 / 35%)); }
input[type="range"]::-moz-range-thumb { width: 18px; height: 18px; border: 3px solid #09131e; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--amber); }
.misconception { padding: .8rem; border-inline-start: 4px solid var(--amber); border-radius: .4rem; background: rgb(246 169 74 / 7%); color: #d8c9b7; }
.misconception-label { display: flex; gap: .45rem; align-items: center; margin: 0 0 .35rem; color: #ffd49b; font-weight: 700; }
.misconception > #misconception { margin: 0; }
#runtime-error { border-color: rgb(255 133 133 / 55%); }

body.projector-mode .lesson { width: 100%; max-width: none; padding: .45rem; }
body.projector-mode .lesson > header,
body.projector-mode #prediction,
body.projector-mode #explain { display: none; }
body.projector-mode .instrument-bar { position: fixed; z-index: 5; inset-block-start: .5rem; inset-inline: .75rem; pointer-events: none; }
body.projector-mode .projector { pointer-events: auto; }
body.projector-mode #observe { min-height: calc(100vh - .9rem); margin: 0; grid-template-columns: 1fr; align-items: center; }
body.projector-mode #observe > .step-number { display: none; }
body.projector-mode canvas { max-height: calc(100vh - 190px); }

@media (min-width: 820px) {
  .lesson {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, .68fr) minmax(0, 1.32fr);
    grid-template-areas:
      "bar bar"
      "intro observe"
      "predict observe"
      "explain observe"
      "error error";
    align-items: start;
    gap: .85rem;
  }
  .instrument-bar { grid-area: bar; margin: 0; }
  .lesson > header { grid-area: intro; margin: 0; }
  #prediction { grid-area: predict; margin: 0; }
  #observe { grid-area: observe; position: sticky; inset-block-start: .7rem; margin: 0; }
  #explain { grid-area: explain; margin: 0; }
  #runtime-error { grid-area: error; }
  .lesson > header h1 { font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.3vw, 3rem); }
  .lesson > header .answer { font-size: .98rem; }
  #prediction { grid-template-columns: 2rem minmax(0, 1fr); padding: 1rem; }
  #prediction .step-number { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; }
  #prediction .choices { gap: .45rem; }
  #prediction button { width: 100%; min-height: 40px; padding: .5rem .65rem; }
  body.projector-mode .lesson { display: block; }
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .lesson { padding: .6rem; }
  .step { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .step-number { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; }
  .answer-detail > summary { min-height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; color: #bfe4ff; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; }
  .answer-detail .answer { margin-block-end: .6rem; }
  #prediction .choices { flex-wrap: nowrap; overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: inline mandatory; padding-block-end: .35rem; }
  #prediction .choices button { min-width: 74%; flex: 0 0 74%; scroll-snap-align: start; }
  .control-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; }
  .control-row input { grid-column: 1 / -1; grid-row: 2; }
  .readout-chip { border-radius: .75rem; line-height: 1.6; }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *, *::before, *::after { scroll-behavior: auto !important; transition: none !important; animation: none !important; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
  <main class="lesson" id="lesson">
    <nav class="instrument-bar" aria-label="أدوات العرض">
      <span class="instrument-brand" aria-label="ليش">ليش<span>.</span></span>
      <button class="projector" id="projector" type="button"></button>
    </nav>
    <header>
      <p class="eyebrow" id="lesson-label"></p>
      <h1 id="lesson-title"></h1>
      <details class="answer-detail" id="answer-detail" open>
        <summary id="answer-summary"></summary>
        <p class="answer" id="answer"></p>
      </details>
      <p class="formula" id="formula" dir="ltr"></p>
    </header>

    <section class="step" id="prediction" aria-labelledby="prediction-title">
      <p class="step-number">1</p>
      <div>
        <h2 id="prediction-title"></h2>
        <p id="prediction-prompt"></p>
        <div class="choices" id="prediction-choices"></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="step phenomenon" id="observe" aria-labelledby="observe-title">
      <p class="step-number">2</p>
      <div class="stage">
        <h2 id="observe-title"></h2>
        <canvas id="simulation" width="720" height="400" role="img" aria-describedby="state-description"></canvas>
        <p id="state-description" class="state readout-chip" aria-live="polite"></p>
        <div class="control-row">
          <label for="primary-control" id="primary-label"></label>
          <input id="primary-control" type="range">
          <output id="primary-output" for="primary-control" dir="auto"></output>
        </div>
        <div class="actions">
          <button id="reset" type="button"></button>
          <button id="replay" type="button"></button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="step" id="explain" aria-labelledby="explain-title" hidden>
      <p class="step-number">3</p>
      <div>
        <h2 id="explain-title"></h2>
        <p id="explanation-prompt"></p>
        <div class="misconception" role="note">
          <p class="misconception-label"><span aria-hidden="true">⚠</span> <span id="misconception-label"></span></p>
          <p id="misconception"></p>
        </div>
        <p id="transfer"></p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="runtime-error" role="alert" hidden>
      <h2 id="runtime-error-title"></h2>
      <p id="runtime-error-copy"></p>
    </section>
  </main>
  <script>window.__LAYSH_LESSON__ = {"safe":true,"unsafe_category":null,"simulatable":true,"reason_code":"safe_science_explanation","lang":"ar","canonical_intent":"relationship_between_sound_frequency_and_pitch","domain":"physics_acoustics","title":"كيف يغيّر التردد حدّة النغمة؟","tldr":"يزداد الإحساس بحدّة النغمة عندما يزداد عدد اهتزازات الموجة في الثانية. يرمز f إلى التردد، وλ إلى الطول الموجي، وv إلى سرعة الصوت الثابتة هنا عند 343 مترًا في الثانية، وT إلى زمن الدورة؛ لذلك يقل كل من الطول الموجي وزمن الدورة مع زيادة التردد، من دون أن يعني ذلك زيادة شدة الصوت.","key_formula":"λ = v / f؛ T = 1 / f","learning_objective":"أن يفسّر المتعلم سببيًا كيف تؤدي زيادة تردد الموجة الصوتية إلى نغمة أحدّ، مع تمييز الحدّة عن شدة الصوت.","primary_parameter":{"id":"frequency_hz","label":"تردد الموجة الصوتية","unit":"Hz","min":110,"max":880,"default":440,"step":10},"secondary_parameter":null,"prediction":{"prompt":"إذا تضاعف تردد الصوت مع ثبات سرعة انتشاره، فماذا يحدث؟","choices":["تصبح النغمة أحدّ وينخفض الطول الموجي وزمن الدورة إلى النصف","تصبح النغمة أشد فقط ويبقى الطول الموجي ثابتًا","تصبح النغمة أغلظ ويزداد زمن الدورة"]},"misconception":"تصحيح: التردد يحدد الحدة، لا شدة الصوت بالضرورة.","explanation_prompt":"حرّك التردد وقارن حدّة النغمة بالطول الموجي وزمن الدورة. فسّر لماذا ينخفض المقداران بينما تزداد الحدّة.","transfer_prompt":"قارن صوتين لهما الشدة نفسها وترددان مختلفان: أيهما أحدّ، وكيف يختلف زمن دورتهما؟","module_spec":{"outputs":["wavelength_m","period_ms"],"actor":"wavefront","action":"propagates"},"checks":[{"id":"frequency_110_wavelength","kind":"numeric","inputs":[{"name":"frequency_hz","value":110}],"output":"wavelength_m","expected":3.118,"tolerance":0.02,"unit":"m"},{"id":"frequency_110_period","kind":"numeric","inputs":[{"name":"frequency_hz","value":110}],"output":"period_ms","expected":9.091,"tolerance":0.02,"unit":"ms"},{"id":"frequency_440_wavelength","kind":"numeric","inputs":[{"name":"frequency_hz","value":440}],"output":"wavelength_m","expected":0.78,"tolerance":0.02,"unit":"m"},{"id":"frequency_440_period","kind":"numeric","inputs":[{"name":"frequency_hz","value":440}],"output":"period_ms","expected":2.273,"tolerance":0.02,"unit":"ms"},{"id":"frequency_880_wavelength","kind":"numeric","inputs":[{"name":"frequency_hz","value":880}],"output":"wavelength_m","expected":0.39,"tolerance":0.02,"unit":"m"},{"id":"frequency_880_period","kind":"numeric","inputs":[{"name":"frequency_hz","value":880}],"output":"period_ms","expected":1.136,"tolerance":0.02,"unit":"ms"}],"suggestions":["استكشف أثر التردد في الطول الموجي.","قارن بين حدّة الصوت وشدته.","لاحظ كيف يتغير زمن الدورة مع التردد."]};</script>
  <script>(() => {
  "use strict";
  const required = ["destroy", "init", "resize", "setParameter", "test", "version"];

  window.LayshContract = Object.freeze({
    assertSimulation(simulation) {
      if (!simulation || typeof simulation !== "object") throw new Error("SIM_CONTRACT_MISSING");
      const keys = Object.keys(simulation).sort();
      if (JSON.stringify(keys) !== JSON.stringify(required)) throw new Error("SIM_CONTRACT_KEYS");
      if (simulation.version !== 1) throw new Error("SIM_CONTRACT_VERSION");
      for (const method of ["init", "setParameter", "test", "resize", "destroy"]) {
        if (typeof simulation[method] !== "function") throw new Error("SIM_CONTRACT_METHOD");
      }
      return simulation;
    },
  });
})();

</script>
  <script>window.LayshSimulation = (function () {
  "use strict";
  var canvas = null, context = null, width = 0, height = 0;
  var locale = "ar", reducedMotion = false, emitFrame = null;
  var frequency = 440, displayedFrequency = 440, visualPhase = 0, initialized = false;

  function roundedRect(x, y, w, h, r) {
    r = Math.min(r, w / 2, h / 2);
    context.beginPath();
    context.moveTo(x + r, y);
    context.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
    context.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
    context.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
    context.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
    context.closePath();
  }

  function chip(x, y, w, label, value, accent) {
    context.save();
    context.shadowColor = "rgba(0,0,0,0.3)";
    context.shadowBlur = 14;
    roundedRect(x, y, w, 48, 14);
    context.fillStyle = "rgba(8,19,38,0.76)";
    context.fill();
    context.shadowBlur = 0;
    context.strokeStyle = accent;
    context.globalAlpha = 0.72;
    context.stroke();
    context.globalAlpha = 1;
    context.textAlign = "center";
    context.textBaseline = "middle";
    context.fillStyle = "rgba(220,234,249,0.8)";
    context.font = "12px sans-serif";
    context.fillText(label, x + w / 2, y + 15);
    context.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
    context.font = "bold 16px sans-serif";
    context.fillText(value, x + w / 2, y + 33);
    context.restore();
  }

  function drawSpeaker(x, y, s) {
    context.save();
    context.shadowColor = "rgba(67,211,255,0.34)";
    context.shadowBlur = 18;
    var body = context.createLinearGradient(x - s, y, x + s, y);
    body.addColorStop(0, "#17253b");
    body.addColorStop(0.55, "#344c69");
    body.addColorStop(1, "#101a2b");
    roundedRect(x - s * 0.9, y - s * 1.2, s * 0.8, s * 2.4, s * 0.18);
    context.fillStyle = body;
    context.fill();
    context.shadowBlur = 0;
    context.beginPath();
    context.moveTo(x - s * 0.12, y - s * 0.72);
    context.lineTo(x + s * 0.7, y - s * 1.05);
    context.lineTo(x + s * 0.7, y + s * 1.05);
    context.lineTo(x - s * 0.12, y + s * 0.72);
    context.closePath();
    var cone = context.createLinearGradient(x, y, x + s * 0.75, y);
    cone.addColorStop(0, "#607b98");
    cone.addColorStop(1, "#18283e");
    context.fillStyle = cone;
    context.fill();
    context.strokeStyle = "rgba(154,207,235,0.55)";
    context.stroke();
    context.beginPath();
    context.ellipse(x + s * 0.7, y, s * 0.14, s * 1.04, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    context.fillStyle = "#07111f";
    context.fill();
    context.strokeStyle = "#65dcff";
    context.globalAlpha = 0.72;
    context.stroke();
    context.restore();
  }

  /* LAYSH_SHARED_MODEL: soundState */
  function soundState(value) {
    var frequencyHz = Number(value);
    if (!Number.isFinite(frequencyHz) || frequencyHz <= 0) frequencyHz = 440;
    return {
      frequency_hz: frequencyHz,
      wavelength_m: 343 / frequencyHz,
      period_ms: 1000 / frequencyHz,
      cycles: 2 + (frequencyHz - 110) / 770 * 6
    };
  }

  function draw(advance) {
    if (!context || width <= 0 || height <= 0) return;
    if (advance && !reducedMotion) visualPhase += 0.075;
    displayedFrequency += (frequency - displayedFrequency) * 0.42;
    if (Math.abs(frequency - displayedFrequency) < 0.05) displayedFrequency = frequency;

    var state = soundState(displayedFrequency);
    var w = width, h = height, cy = h * 0.53, i;
    var bg = context.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h);
    bg.addColorStop(0, "#071327");
    bg.addColorStop(0.55, "#0c2440");
    bg.addColorStop(1, "#07101e");
    context.fillStyle = bg;
    context.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

    var glow = context.createRadialGradient(w * 0.48, cy, 8, w * 0.48, cy, Math.max(w, h) * 0.55);
    glow.addColorStop(0, "rgba(41,171,214,0.2)");
    glow.addColorStop(0.55, "rgba(22,83,130,0.08)");
    glow.addColorStop(1, "rgba(0,0,0,0)");
    context.fillStyle = glow;
    context.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

    context.save();
    for (i = 0; i < 34; i++) {
      var px = ((i * 83 + 29) % 997) / 997 * w;
      var py = ((i * 47 + 13) % 521) / 521 * h;
      var shimmer = 0.12 + 0.08 * Math.sin(visualPhase + i * 1.71);
      context.fillStyle = "rgba(126,205,232," + shimmer + ")";
      context.beginPath();
      context.arc(px, py, 0.7 + (i % 3) * 0.35, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      context.fill();
    }
    context.restore();

    var floorY = h * 0.81;
    var floor = context.createLinearGradient(0, floorY, 0, h);
    floor.addColorStop(0, "rgba(38,77,105,0.48)");
    floor.addColorStop(1, "rgba(4,9,17,0.9)");
    context.fillStyle = floor;
    context.fillRect(0, floorY, w, h - floorY);
    context.strokeStyle = "rgba(96,180,207,0.12)";
    for (i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
      var gy = floorY + (h - floorY) * (i + 1) / 7;
      context.beginPath();
      context.moveTo(0, gy);
      context.lineTo(w, gy);
      context.stroke();
    }

    var speakerX = Math.max(54, w * 0.13);
    var speakerSize = Math.min(48, h * 0.105);
    drawSpeaker(speakerX, cy, speakerSize);

    var startX = speakerX + speakerSize * 0.72;
    var endX = w * 0.93;
    var waveW = Math.max(40, endX - startX);
    var cycles = state.cycles;
    var amp = Math.min(h * 0.16, 60);
    var phaseShift = reducedMotion ? 0 : visualPhase * (0.45 + state.frequency_hz / 880 * 0.35);

    context.save();
    context.lineCap = "round";
    for (var trail = 4; trail >= 0; trail--) {
      context.beginPath();
      for (i = 0; i <= 180; i++) {
        var t = i / 180;
        var x = startX + t * waveW;
        var envelope = Math.sin(Math.PI * Math.min(1, t * 1.12));
        var y = cy + Math.sin(t * Math.PI * 2 * cycles - phaseShift - trail * 0.075) * amp * envelope;
        if (i === 0) context.moveTo(x, y); else context.lineTo(x, y);
      }
      context.strokeStyle = trail === 0 ? "rgba(102,226,255,0.96)" : "rgba(60,173,255," + (0.05 + (4 - trail) * 0.025) + ")";
      context.lineWidth = trail === 0 ? 3 : 3 + trail * 2.5;
      context.shadowColor = "rgba(67,205,255,0.72)";
      context.shadowBlur = trail === 0 ? 12 : 0;
      context.stroke();
    }
    context.restore();

    var lambdaPixels = waveW / cycles;
    var bx = Math.min(endX - lambdaPixels, startX + waveW * 0.44);
    var by = cy - amp - 31;
    context.save();
    context.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,211,101,0.9)";
    context.fillStyle = "#ffe092";
    context.lineWidth = 1.5;
    context.beginPath();
    context.moveTo(bx, by);
    context.lineTo(bx + lambdaPixels, by);
    context.moveTo(bx, by - 5);
    context.lineTo(bx, by + 5);
    context.moveTo(bx + lambdaPixels, by - 5);
    context.lineTo(bx + lambdaPixels, by + 5);
    context.stroke();
    context.textAlign = "center";
    context.font = "bold 15px sans-serif";
    context.fillText("λ", bx + lambdaPixels / 2, by - 10);
    context.restore();

    var wavelength = state.wavelength_m;
    var period = state.period_ms;
    var chipW = Math.min(174, Math.max(132, w * 0.25));
    var gap = 10;
    var total = chipW * 3 + gap * 2;
    if (total > w - 24) {
      chipW = Math.max(1, (w - 44) / 3);
      total = chipW * 3 + gap * 2;
    }
    var chipsX = (w - total) / 2;
    var chipsY = Math.max(12, h * 0.055);
    chip(chipsX, chipsY, chipW, "التردد · حدّة النغمة", Math.round(state.frequency_hz) + " Hz", "rgba(100,224,255,0.72)");
    chip(chipsX + chipW + gap, chipsY, chipW, "الطول الموجي λ", wavelength.toFixed(3) + " m", "rgba(255,214,112,0.72)");
    chip(chipsX + (chipW + gap) * 2, chipsY, chipW, "زمن الدورة T", period.toFixed(3) + " ms", "rgba(174,140,255,0.72)");

    context.save();
    context.textAlign = "center";
    context.fillStyle = "rgba(205,226,240,0.72)";
    context.font = "13px sans-serif";
    context.fillText("سرعة الصوت ثابتة: 343 m/s  ·  التردد يغيّر الحدّة لا الشدة", w / 2, Math.min(h - 15, floorY + 27));
    context.restore();
  }

  function safeDraw(advance) {
    try {
      draw(advance);
    } catch (error) {
      if (context && typeof context.fillRect === "function" && width > 0 && height > 0) {
        try {
          context.fillStyle = "#071327";
          context.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
        } catch (ignored) {}
      }
    }
  }

  function signalFrame() {
    if (typeof emitFrame === "function") {
      try { emitFrame(); } catch (ignored) {}
    }
  }

  return {
    version: 1,
    init: function (options) {
      options = options || {};
      canvas = options.canvas || null;
      context = options.context || null;
      width = Number(options.width) || 0;
      height = Number(options.height) || 0;
      locale = options.locale || "ar";
      reducedMotion = Boolean(options.reducedMotion);
      emitFrame = options.emitFrame;
      initialized = true;
      safeDraw(false);
      signalFrame();
    },
    setParameter: function (name, value) {
      if (name !== "frequency_hz") return;
      var next = Number(value);
      if (!Number.isFinite(next)) return;
      next = Math.max(110, Math.min(880, next));
      var same = next === frequency;
      frequency = next;
      safeDraw(same);
      signalFrame();
    },
    test: function (inputs) {
      var f = 440;
      if (inputs && Array.isArray(inputs)) {
        for (var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++) {
          if (inputs[i] && inputs[i].name === "frequency_hz") f = Number(inputs[i].value);
        }
      } else if (inputs && inputs.frequency_hz !== undefined) {
        f = Number(inputs.frequency_hz);
      }
      var state = soundState(f);
      return { wavelength_m: state.wavelength_m, period_ms: state.period_ms };
    },
    resize: function (nextWidth, nextHeight) {
      if (nextWidth && typeof nextWidth === "object") {
        width = Number(nextWidth.width) || width;
        height = Number(nextWidth.height) || height;
      } else {
        width = Number(nextWidth) || width;
        height = Number(nextHeight) || height;
      }
      if (initialized) {
        safeDraw(false);
        signalFrame();
      }
    },
    destroy: function () {
      canvas = null;
      context = null;
      emitFrame = null;
      initialized = false;
    }
  };
}());</script>
  <script>(() => {
  "use strict";
  const lesson = window.__LAYSH_LESSON__;
  const dir = document.documentElement.dir;
  const ar = lesson.lang === "ar";
  const labels = ar
    ? {
        lesson: "الجواب التفاعلي",
        predict: "توقّع أولًا",
        observe: "لاحظ ما يتغيّر",
        explain: "فسّر ما رأيت",
        misconception: "فكرة شائعة تحتاج إلى تصحيح",
        reset: "إعادة الضبط",
        replay: "إعادة العرض",
        projector: "وضع العرض",
        exitProjector: "إنهاء العرض",
        answerDetails: "اقرأ الجواب الكامل",
        runtimeTitle: "تعذّر تشغيل المحاكاة",
        runtimeCopy: "يمكنك الاحتفاظ بالجواب والمحاولة مرة أخرى من Laysh.",
      }
    : {
        lesson: "Interactive answer",
        predict: "Predict first",
        observe: "Observe what changes",
        explain: "Explain what you saw",
        misconception: "Common misconception",
        reset: "Reset",
        replay: "Replay",
        projector: "Projector mode",
        exitProjector: "Exit projector",
        answerDetails: "Read the full answer",
        runtimeTitle: "The simulation could not run",
        runtimeCopy: "Keep the answer and try again from Laysh.",
      };

  const byId = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
  const canvas = byId("simulation");
  const control = byId("primary-control");
  const output = byId("primary-output");
  const description = byId("state-description");
  const reducedMotion = matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches;
  const compactLayout = matchMedia("(max-width: 480px)");
  let simulation;
  let frameCount = 0;
  let idleFrameId = 0;
  let previousIdleAt = 0;
  let idlePhaseBudget = 0;
  const pendulumPhaseIncrement = 0.085;
  const maxIdleStepMs = 100;

  document.body.dataset.direction = dir === "rtl" ? "rtl" : "ltr";
  byId("lesson-label").textContent = labels.lesson;
  byId("lesson-title").textContent = lesson.title;
  byId("answer").textContent = lesson.tldr;
  byId("answer-summary").textContent = labels.answerDetails;
  byId("formula").textContent = lesson.key_formula || "";
  byId("prediction-title").textContent = labels.predict;
  byId("prediction-prompt").textContent = lesson.prediction.prompt;
  byId("observe-title").textContent = labels.observe;
  byId("explain-title").textContent = labels.explain;
  byId("explanation-prompt").textContent = lesson.explanation_prompt;
  byId("misconception-label").textContent = labels.misconception;
  byId("misconception").textContent = lesson.misconception;
  byId("transfer").textContent = lesson.transfer_prompt || "";
  byId("reset").textContent = labels.reset;
  byId("replay").textContent = labels.replay;
  byId("projector").textContent = labels.projector;
  byId("runtime-error-title").textContent = labels.runtimeTitle;
  byId("runtime-error-copy").textContent = labels.runtimeCopy;
  function syncCompactAnswer() {
    if (compactLayout.matches) byId("answer-detail").open = false;
  }
  syncCompactAnswer();
  compactLayout.addEventListener("change", syncCompactAnswer);

  const parameter = lesson.primary_parameter;
  byId("primary-label").textContent = parameter.label;
  Object.assign(control, {
    min: String(parameter.min),
    max: String(parameter.max),
    step: String(parameter.step),
    value: String(parameter.default),
  });

  function formatState(value) {
    const tested = simulation.test({ [parameter.id]: Number(value) });
    const observed = tested[lesson.module_spec.outputs[0]];
    const valueText = Number.isFinite(observed) ? Number(observed).toFixed(2) : String(observed);
    return ar
      ? `${parameter.label}: ${value} ${parameter.unit} — النتيجة المحسوبة: ${valueText}`
      : `${parameter.label}: ${value} ${parameter.unit} — calculated outcome: ${valueText}`;
  }

  function emitFrame() {
    frameCount += 1;
    document.documentElement.dataset.frameCount = String(frameCount);
    document.documentElement.dataset.layshReady = "true";
    if (window.parent !== window) {
      window.parent.postMessage({ source: "laysh-artifact", type: "ready", version: 1 }, "*");
    }
  }

  function update(value) {
    simulation.setParameter(parameter.id, Number(value));
    output.value = `${value} ${parameter.unit}`;
    description.textContent = formatState(value);
  }

  function selectPrediction(button) {
    for (const choice of byId("prediction-choices").querySelectorAll("button")) {
      choice.setAttribute("aria-pressed", String(choice === button));
    }
  }

  for (const choice of lesson.prediction.choices) {
    const button = document.createElement("button");
    button.type = "button";
    button.textContent = choice;
    button.setAttribute("aria-pressed", "false");
    button.addEventListener("click", () => selectPrediction(button));
    byId("prediction-choices").append(button);
  }

  control.addEventListener("input", () => {
    previousIdleAt = 0;
    idlePhaseBudget = 0;
    update(control.value);
    byId("explain").hidden = false;
  });

  byId("reset").addEventListener("click", () => {
    control.value = String(parameter.default);
    update(control.value);
  });

  byId("replay").addEventListener("click", () => {
    const replayValue = Number(control.value) === parameter.max ? parameter.min : parameter.max;
    control.value = String(replayValue);
    update(control.value);
    byId("explain").hidden = false;
  });

  function syncProjectorState(active) {
    document.body.classList.toggle("projector-mode", active);
    byId("projector").textContent = active ? labels.exitProjector : labels.projector;
    byId("projector").setAttribute("aria-pressed", String(active));
  }

  byId("projector").addEventListener("click", async () => {
    const active = !document.body.classList.contains("projector-mode");
    syncProjectorState(active);
    try {
      if (active && !document.fullscreenElement) await document.documentElement.requestFullscreen();
      if (!active && document.fullscreenElement) await document.exitFullscreen();
    } catch {
      // The projector layout remains available when fullscreen permission is denied.
    }
  });
  document.addEventListener("fullscreenchange", () => {
    if (!document.fullscreenElement) syncProjectorState(false);
  });

  function scheduleIdleFrame(timestamp = 0) {
    if (reducedMotion) return;
    if (lesson.module_spec.action === "oscillates") {
      if (previousIdleAt > 0) {
        const elapsedMs = Math.min(maxIdleStepMs, Math.max(0, timestamp - previousIdleAt));
        const model = simulation.test({ [parameter.id]: Number(control.value) });
        const periodSeconds = Number(model && model.period_s);
        if (Number.isFinite(periodSeconds) && periodSeconds > 0) {
          idlePhaseBudget += (elapsedMs / (periodSeconds * 1000)) * Math.PI * 2;
          const redrawCount = Math.min(
            8,
            Math.floor(idlePhaseBudget / pendulumPhaseIncrement),
          );
          for (let index = 0; index < redrawCount; index += 1) {
            simulation.setParameter(parameter.id, Number(control.value));
          }
          idlePhaseBudget -= redrawCount * pendulumPhaseIncrement;
        }
      }
      previousIdleAt = timestamp;
      idleFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(scheduleIdleFrame);
      return;
    }
    if (timestamp - previousIdleAt >= 80) {
      previousIdleAt = timestamp;
      simulation.setParameter(parameter.id, Number(control.value));
    }
    idleFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(scheduleIdleFrame);
  }

  function resize() {
    const width = Math.max(280, Math.min(720, canvas.clientWidth || 720));
    const height = Math.round(width * 0.56);
    canvas.width = width;
    canvas.height = height;
    simulation.resize(width, height);
  }

  try {
    simulation = window.LayshContract.assertSimulation(window.LayshSimulation);
    simulation.init({
      canvas,
      context: canvas.getContext("2d"),
      width: canvas.width,
      height: canvas.height,
      locale: lesson.lang,
      reducedMotion,
      emitFrame,
    });
    update(parameter.default);
    idleFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(scheduleIdleFrame);
    window.addEventListener("resize", resize, { passive: true });
    window.addEventListener("pagehide", () => {
      cancelAnimationFrame(idleFrameId);
      simulation.destroy();
    }, { once: true });
  } catch {
    byId("runtime-error").hidden = false;
    document.documentElement.dataset.runtimeError = "SIM_RUNTIME_ERROR";
    if (window.parent !== window) {
      window.parent.postMessage(
        { source: "laysh-artifact", type: "runtime-error", code: "SIM_RUNTIME_ERROR" },
        "*",
      );
    }
  }
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
title: كيف يغيّر التردد حدّة النغمة؟

answer.tldr: يزداد الإحساس بحدّة النغمة عندما يزداد عدد اهتزازات الموجة في الثانية. يرمز f إلى التردد، وλ إلى الطول الموجي، وv إلى سرعة الصوت الثابتة هنا عند 343 مترًا في الثانية، وT إلى زمن الدورة؛ لذلك يقل كل من الطول الموجي وزمن الدورة مع زيادة التردد، من دون أن يعني ذلك زيادة شدة الصوت.

ar.title: التردد وحدّة الصوت
ar.summary: غيّر التردد وقارن عدد دورات الموجة وطولها الموجي دون تشغيل صوت.

en.title: Frequency and sound pitch
en.summary: Change frequency and compare wave cycles and wavelength without playing audio.

notes: The lesson separates pitch from loudness and holds visual amplitude constant.
The reviewed formula includes both wavelength and period because both outputs are independently tested.
The luminous waveform remains smooth and legible at 110 Hz, 440 Hz, and 880 Hz; no audio capability is requested.
Traveling phase, speaker depth, ambient particles, and frequency/wavelength/period chips satisfy the v1.1 motion and overlay review.

reference_contract.misconception: تصحيح: التردد يحدد الحدة، لا شدة الصوت بالضرورة.

browser.alternative: تردد الموجة الصوتية: 440 Hz — النتيجة المحسوبة: 0.78
